name: D+Q diabetic kidney disease senescence biomarker result

effect.raw_text: Reported decreases in senescent-cell and SASP-related biomarkers after intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin.

statement: The result is an early human biomarker signal and should not be interpreted as a clinical benefit claim.
